title: PRESIDIO TUNNEL TOPS - Updated June 2026
content: I loved the view of the Golden Gate Bridge . There are paths to walk on, a playground for kids, a couple of cafes, restrooms and a really nice visitor center.

title: Presidio Tunnel Tops | San Francisco Must See | The Presidio (San Francisco)
content: # Presidio Tunnel Tops. Nature, picnic sites, a playground, food vendors, and free family fun – in one easy-to-access spot. Made by the community, for the community, it offers unforgettable Golden Gate Bridge views, the Presidio Visitor Center, the Outpost playground, Outpost Meadow Picnic Area and Field Station curiosity lab, trails and public lawns, Presidio Pop Up food celebrating diverse cultures, and some of the best places to picnic in the Presidio. It’s built on and around the Presidio Parkway tunnels (hence Tunnel Tops!), making it easy and fun to walk from the center of the Presidio to the park’s beautiful waterfront at Crissy Field. Presidio Tunnel Tops is free to all and open every day. A large group of people having a picnic on a lawn at Presidio Tunnel Tops. Children playing at the Outpost playground at Presidio Tunnel Tops. The Outpost playground is the place for kids to have fun. Enjoy a picnic and the views at the Outpost Meadow Picnic Area.
